Specifies if this attribute should be written out when creating the external representation of this transform. This metadata has a default value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

# SecTransformMetaAttributeType.externalize

**Case**

The attribute is exportable.

## Declaration

```swift
case externalize
```

## Discussion

Specifies if this attribute should be written out when creating the external representation of this transform. This metadata has a default value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].
title: SecTransformMetaAttributeType.externalize
